name: Sister Orsa
physical_description: Broad-shouldered and mud-stained, with a travel icon of Prios wrapped in worn yellow cloth around one wrist.
speaking_style: Plain, severe sentences that turn unexpectedly gentle with the grieving.
motivation: Stop the ruin from claiming more lives without handing the frontier entirely to corrupt hunters.
secret: She falsified one church report to keep the Sun Choir from burning an innocent family.

relationships.name: Archivist Serel
relationships.description: Distrusts Serel's scholarship but keeps returning for answers.
